info.name: Solar Backend API
info.description: API documentation for Solar Backend - A comprehensive e-commerce and inventory management system

request.description:
# Add Customer Address
  
  Adds a new address to a customer.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | addressLine1 | string | Yes | Primary address line (max 255 characters) |
  | addressLine2 | string | No | Secondary address line (max 255 characters, nullable) |
  | city | string | Yes | City name (max 100 characters) |
  | state | string | Yes | State/Province (max 100 characters) |
  | postalCode | string | Yes | Postal/ZIP code (max 20 characters) |
  | country | string | Yes | Country name (max 100 characters) |
  | type | string | Yes | Address type: "SHIPPING" or "BILLING" |
  | isDefault | boolean | No | Set as default address |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **201 Created**: Address added successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Address added successfully",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid"

# Create Customer
  
  Creates a new customer.
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | firstName | string | Yes | Customer first name (2-100 characters) |
  | lastName | string | Yes | Customer last name (2-100 characters) |
  | phone | string | Yes | Phone number (10-20 characters) |
  | email | string | No | Email address (valid email format, nullable) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **201 Created**: Customer created successfully
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Customer created successfully",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid"

# Delete Customer Address
  
  Deletes a customer's address.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  | addressId | uuid | Address ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Address deleted successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer or address not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Address deleted successfully"

# Get Customer
  
  Retrieves a single customer by ID.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns customer data
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "firstName": "string",
      "lastName": "string",
      "phone": "string",
      "email": "string | null",
      "createdAt": "datetime",
      "updatedAt": "datetime"

# List Customer Addresses
  
  Retrieves all addresses for a specific customer.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns array of addresses
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "customerId": "uuid",
        "addressLine1": "string",
        "addressLine2": "string | null",
        "city": "string",
        "state": "string",
        "postalCode": "string",
        "country": "string",
        "type": "SHIPPING | BILLING",
        "isDefault": "boolean",
        "createdAt": "datetime",
        "updatedAt": "datetime"

# List Customers
  
  Retrieves a list of all customers.
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns array of customers
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "firstName": "string",
        "lastName": "string",
        "phone": "string",
        "email": "string | null",
        "createdAt": "datetime",
        "updatedAt": "datetime"

# Update Customer Address
  
  Updates an existing customer address.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  | addressId | uuid | Address ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | addressLine1 | string | No | Primary address line (max 255 characters) |
  | addressLine2 | string | No | Secondary address line (max 255 characters, nullable) |
  | city | string | No | City name (max 100 characters) |
  | state | string | No | State/Province (max 100 characters) |
  | postalCode | string | No | Postal/ZIP code (max 20 characters) |
  | country | string | No | Country name (max 100 characters) |
  | type | string | No | Address type: "SHIPPING" or "BILLING" |
  | isDefault | boolean | No | Set as default address |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Address updated successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer or address not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Address updated successfully",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "customerId": "uuid",
      "addressLine1": "string",
      "addressLine2": "string | null",
      "city": "string",
      "state": "string",
      "postalCode": "string",
      "country": "string",
      "type": "SHIPPING | BILLING",
      "isDefault": "boolean",
      "createdAt": "datetime",
      "updatedAt": "datetime"

# Update Customer
  
  Updates an existing customer's information.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Customer ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | firstName | string | No | Customer first name (2-100 characters) |
  | lastName | string | No | Customer last name (2-100 characters) |
  | phone | string | No | Phone number (10-20 characters) |
  | email | string | No | Email address (valid email format, nullable) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Customer updated successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Customer not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Customer updated successfully",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "firstName": "string",
      "lastName": "string",
      "phone": "string",
      "email": "string | null",
      "createdAt": "datetime",
      "updatedAt": "datetime"

request.description:
# Cancel Order
  
  Cancels an existing order.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Order ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | reason | string | No | Cancellation reason (max 500 characters, nullable) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Order cancelled successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Order not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error or order cannot be cancelled
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Order cancelled successfully"

# Create Order
  
  Creates a new order for a customer.
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | customerId | uuid | Yes | Customer ID |
  | items | array | Yes | Array of order items (min 1 item) |
  | items[].productId | uuid | Yes | Product ID |
  | items[].quantity | number | Yes | Quantity (1-1000) |
  | shippingAddressId | uuid | Yes | Shipping address ID |
  | customerNotes | string | No | Order notes (max 1000 characters, nullable) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **201 Created**: Order created successfully
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Order created successfully",
    "data": {
      "orderNumber": "string"

# Get Order by Number
  
  Retrieves a single order by its order number.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | orderNumber | string | Order number (e.g., ORD-2024-000001) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns order data
  - **404 Not Found**: Order not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "orderNumber": "string",
      "customerId": "uuid",
      "status": "string",
      "customerFirstName": "string",
      "customerLastName": "string",
      "customerPhone": "string",
      "shippingAddressLine1": "string",
      "shippingAddressLine2": "string | null",
      "shippingCity": "string",
      "shippingState": "string",
      "shippingPostalCode": "string",
      "shippingCountry": "string",
      "subtotal": "number",
      "shippingFee": "number",
      "total": "number",
      "customerNotes": "string | null",
      "adminNotes": "string | null",
      "confirmedAt": "datetime | null",
      "shippedAt": "datetime | null",
      "deliveredAt": "datetime | null",
      "cancelledAt": "datetime | null",
      "createdAt": "datetime",
      "updatedAt": "datetime",
      "items": [
        {
          "id": "uuid",
          "productId": "uuid",
          "productName": "string",
          "productSlug": "string",
          "quantity": "number",
          "unitPrice": "number",
          "totalPrice": "number"

# Get Order
  
  Retrieves a single order by ID.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Order ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns order data
  - **404 Not Found**: Order not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "orderNumber": "string",
      "customerId": "uuid",
      "status": "string",
      "customerFirstName": "string",
      "customerLastName": "string",
      "customerPhone": "string",
      "shippingAddressLine1": "string",
      "shippingAddressLine2": "string | null",
      "shippingCity": "string",
      "shippingState": "string",
      "shippingPostalCode": "string",
      "shippingCountry": "string",
      "subtotal": "number",
      "shippingFee": "number",
      "total": "number",
      "customerNotes": "string | null",
      "adminNotes": "string | null",
      "confirmedAt": "datetime | null",
      "shippedAt": "datetime | null",
      "deliveredAt": "datetime | null",
      "cancelledAt": "datetime | null",
      "createdAt": "datetime",
      "updatedAt": "datetime",
      "items": [
        {
          "id": "uuid",
          "productId": "uuid",
          "productName": "string",
          "productSlug": "string",
          "quantity": "number",
          "unitPrice": "number",
          "totalPrice": "number"

# Get Orders by Customer
  
  Retrieves all orders for a specific customer.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | customerId | uuid | Customer ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns array of orders with pagination metadata
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "orderNumber": "string",
        "customerId": "uuid",
        "status": "string",
        "customerFirstName": "string",
        "customerLastName": "string",
        "customerPhone": "string",
        "shippingAddressLine1": "string",
        "shippingAddressLine2": "string | null",
        "shippingCity": "string",
        "shippingState": "string",
        "shippingPostalCode": "string",
        "shippingCountry": "string",
        "subtotal": "number",
        "shippingFee": "number",
        "total": "number",
        "customerNotes": "string | null",
        "adminNotes": "string | null",
        "confirmedAt": "datetime | null",
        "shippedAt": "datetime | null",
        "deliveredAt": "datetime | null",
        "cancelledAt": "datetime | null",
        "createdAt": "datetime",
        "updatedAt": "datetime",
        "items": [
          {
            "id": "uuid",
            "productId": "uuid",
            "productName": "string",
            "productSlug": "string",
            "quantity": "number",
            "unitPrice": "number",
            "totalPrice": "number"

# List Orders
  
  Retrieves a list of all orders with optional status filtering.
  
  ## Query Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  |-----------|------|----------|-------------|
  | status | string | No | Filter by order status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns array of orders
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "orderNumber": "string",
        "customerId": "uuid",
        "status": "string",
        "customerFirstName": "string",
        "customerLastName": "string",
        "customerPhone": "string",
        "shippingAddressLine1": "string",
        "shippingAddressLine2": "string | null",
        "shippingCity": "string",
        "shippingState": "string",
        "shippingPostalCode": "string",
        "shippingCountry": "string",
        "subtotal": "number",
        "shippingFee": "number",
        "total": "number",
        "customerNotes": "string | null",
        "adminNotes": "string | null",
        "confirmedAt": "datetime | null",
        "shippedAt": "datetime | null",
        "deliveredAt": "datetime | null",
        "cancelledAt": "datetime | null",
        "createdAt": "datetime",
        "updatedAt": "datetime",
        "items": [
          {
            "id": "uuid",
            "productId": "uuid",
            "productName": "string",
            "productSlug": "string",
            "quantity": "number",
            "unitPrice": "number",
            "totalPrice": "number"

# Update Order Status
  
  Updates the status of an order (admin only).
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Order ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | status | string | Yes | New status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED |
  | adminNotes | string | No | Admin notes (max 1000 characters, nullable) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Order status updated successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Order not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Order status updated successfully"

# Create Product Pack
  
  Creates a new product pack.
  
  ## Request Body
  
  - designation: string (min 2)
  - description: string (optional)
  - price: number (positive)
  - mainImageId: uuid (optional)
  - stockQuantity: number|null (optional)
  - lowStockThreshold: number (optional)
  - items: array (min 1) of { productId: uuid, quantity: number }

# Delete Product Pack

  Deletes a product pack.

# Get Product Pack Stock

  Retrieves stock information for a product pack.

# Get Product Pack
  
  Retrieves a product pack by id.

# Delete Product Pack
  
  Deletes a product pack.

# Set Product Pack Stock

  Sets stock quantity for a product pack.

  Use null to make it unlimited (if supported by domain rules).

# Update Product Pack
  
  Updates an existing product pack.

# Products Grouped By Category
  
  Retrieves products grouped by their categories with main image only (no additional images).
  
  ## Query Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
  |-----------|------|---------|-------------|
  | q | string | - | Search term to filter by designation |
  | page | number | 1 | Page number |
  | limit | number | 10 | Items per page |
  
  ## Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "meta": {
      "total": 100,
      "perPage": 10,
      "currentPage": 1,
      "lastPage": 10
    },
    "data": [
      {
        "categoryId": "uuid",
        "categoryName": "Category Name",
        "products": [
          {
            "id": "uuid",
            "slug": "product-slug",
            "designation": "Product Name",
            "price": 99.99,
            "categoryName": "Category Name",
            "categoryId": "uuid",
            "mainImageUrl": "signed-url",
            "brand": "Brand Name",
            "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
            "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"

# Create Product
  
  Creates a new product with a main image and optional additional images.
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | designation | string | Yes | Product name (min 2 characters) |
  | description | string | Yes | Product description |
  | categoryId | uuid | Yes | Category ID |
  | mainImageId | uuid | Yes | Main product image ID |
  | price | number | Yes | Product price |
  | brand | string | No | Brand name |
  | imageIds | array | No | Array of additional image IDs (max 2) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **201 Created**: Product created successfully
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Get Product
  
  Retrieves a single product with full details including main image and all additional images.
  
  ## URL Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | product_id | uuid | Product ID to retrieve |
  
  ## Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "data": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "slug": "product-slug",
      "categoryId": "uuid",
      "designation": "Product Name",
      "description": "Product description",
      "price": 99.99,
      "brand": "Brand Name",
      "isAvailable": true,
      "isDeleted": false,
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
      "category": {
        "id": "uuid",
        "designation": "Category Name"
      },
      "mainImage": {
        "id": "uuid",
        "url": "signed-url",
        "alt": "Alt description",
        "title": "Image title"
      },
      "images": [
        {
          "id": "uuid",
          "url": "signed-url",
          "alt": "Alt description",
          "title": "Image title"

# List Products
  
  Retrieves a paginated list of products with main image only (no additional images).
  
  ## Query Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
  |-----------|------|---------|-------------|
  | q | string | - | Search term to filter by designation |
  | page | number | 1 | Page number |
  | limit | number | 10 | Items per page |
  
  ## Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "meta": {
      "total": 100,
      "perPage": 10,
      "currentPage": 1,
      "lastPage": 10
    },
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "slug": "product-slug",
        "designation": "Product Name",
        "price": 99.99,
        "categoryName": "Category Name",
        "categoryId": "uuid",
        "mainImageUrl": "signed-url",
        "mainImageAlt": "Alt description",
        "mainImageTitle": "Image title",
        "brand": "Brand Name",
        "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"

# Update Product
  
  Updates an existing product including its main image and additional images.
  
  ## URL Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | product_id | uuid | Product ID to update |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | designation | string | Yes | Product name (min 2 characters) |
  | description | string | Yes | Product description |
  | categoryId | uuid | Yes | Category ID |
  | mainImageId | uuid | Yes | Main product image ID |
  | price | number | Yes | Product price |
  | brand | string | No | Brand name |
  | imageIds | array | No | Array of additional image IDs (max 2). Replaces existing additional images. |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **204 No Content**: Product updated successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Product not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Add Stock
  
  Adds stock quantity to a product.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Product ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | quantity | number | Yes | Quantity to add (must be positive) |
  | reason | string | No | Reason for adding stock (max 255 characters) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **204 No Content**: Stock added successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Product not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Get Low Stock Products
  
  Retrieves a paginated list of products that are running low on stock (stock quantity is below or equal to the low stock threshold but greater than 0).
  
  ## Query Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  |-----------|------|----------|-------------|
  | page | number | No | Page number (default: 1) |
  | limit | number | No | Items per page (default: 10) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns paginated list of low stock products
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "meta": {
      "total": "number",
      "perPage": "number",
      "currentPage": "number",
      "lastPage": "number",
      "firstPage": "number",
      "firstPageUrl": "string",
      "lastPageUrl": "string",
      "nextPageUrl": "string | null",
      "previousPageUrl": "string | null"
    },
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "designation": "string",
        "stockQuantity": "number",
        "lowStockThreshold": "number",
        "slug": "string"

# Get Product Stock
  
  Retrieves the stock information for a specific product.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Product ID |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns stock data
  - **404 Not Found**: Product not found
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "data": {
      "productId": "uuid",
      "quantity": "number",
      "lowStockThreshold": "number",
      "isLowStock": "boolean",
      "isOutOfStock": "boolean"

# Get Stock History
  
  Retrieves the stock movement history for a specific product with pagination.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Product ID |
  
  ## Query Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  |-----------|------|----------|-------------|
  | page | number | No | Page number (min 1, default: 1) |
  | limit | number | No | Items per page (min 1, max 100, default: 20) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Returns paginated stock movement history
  
  ### Response Body
  
  ```json
  {
    "meta": {
      "total": "number",
      "perPage": "number",
      "currentPage": "number",
      "lastPage": "number",
      "firstPage": "number",
      "firstPageUrl": "string",
      "lastPageUrl": "string",
      "nextPageUrl": "string | null",
      "previousPageUrl": "string | null"
    },
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "operationType": "ADD | REMOVE | SET",
        "quantity": "number",
        "previousQuantity": "number",
        "newQuantity": "number",
        "reason": "string | null",
        "createdAt": "datetime"

# Remove Stock
  
  Removes stock quantity from a product.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Product ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | quantity | number | Yes | Quantity to remove (must be positive) |
  | reason | string | No | Reason for removing stock (max 255 characters) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **204 No Content**: Stock removed successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Product not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error or insufficient stock

# Set Stock
  
  Sets the stock quantity of a product to a specific value.
  
  ## Path Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | id | uuid | Product ID |
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | quantity | number | Yes | New stock quantity (min 0) |
  | reason | string | No | Reason for setting stock (max 255 characters) |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **204 No Content**: Stock set successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Product not found
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Create Store
  
  Creates a new store.
  
  ## Request Body
  
  | Field | Type | Required | Description |
  |-------|------|----------|-------------|
  | designation | string | Yes | Store designation (min 1 character) |
  | address | object | Yes | Store address object |
  | address.street | string | Yes | Street name and number |
  | address.city | string | Yes | City name |
  | address.country | string | No | Country name |
  | address.postalCode | string | No | Postal or ZIP code |
  | phoneNumber1 | object | Yes | Primary phone contact |
  | phoneNumber1.countryCode | string | Yes | Country dialing code (digits only, no `+`) |
  | phoneNumber1.number | string | Yes | Phone number (digits only) |
  | businessHours | array<object> | Yes | Business hours entries |
  | businessHours[].day | number | Yes | Business day index (0=Monday, 1=Tuesday, 2=Wednesday, 3=Thursday, 4=Friday) |
  | businessHours[].startTime | number | Yes | Opening hour in 24h format (0-23) |
  | businessHours[].endTime | number | Yes | Closing hour in 24h format (0-23) |
  | phoneNumber2 | object | No | Secondary phone contact |
  | phoneNumber2.countryCode | string | Yes (if object provided) | Country dialing code |
  | phoneNumber2.number | string | Yes (if object provided) | Phone number |
  | whatsappNumber | object | No | WhatsApp contact |
  | whatsappNumber.countryCode | string | Yes (if object provided) | Country dialing code |
  | whatsappNumber.number | string | Yes (if object provided) | Phone number |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **201 Created**: Store created successfully
  - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
  - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid bearer token

# Get Store
  
  Retrieves a single store by its ID.
  
  ## URL Parameters
  
  | Parameter | Type | Description |
  |-----------|------|-------------|
  | store_id | uuid | Store ID to retrieve |
  
  ## Response
  
  - **200 OK**: Store retrieved successfully
  - **404 Not Found**: Store not found
  - **401 Unauthorized**: Missing or invalid bearer token
  
  ## Response Body (200)
  
  ```json
  {
    "id": "uuid",
    "designation": "Main Branch",
    "address": {
      "street": "123 Solar Street",
      "city": "Douala",
      "country": "Cameroon",
      "postalCode": "00000",
      "region": "Littoral"
    },
    "phoneContact1": {
      "countryCode": "237",
      "number": "699112233"
    },
    "phoneContact2": {
      "countryCode": "237",
      "number": "677445566"
    },
    "whatsAppContact": {
      "countryCode": "237",
      "number": "655001122"
    },
    "status": "active",
    "statusReason": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-22T10:00:00.000+00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-22T10:00:00.000+00:00"

# List Modifier Groups

Retrieves a paginated list of all product modifier groups.

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | 10 | Items per page |
| q | string | - | Search term to filter by designation |
| sortBy | string | createdAt | Sort field |
| sortOrder | string | desc | Sort order (asc/desc) |

## Response

- **200 OK**: Returns paginated list of modifier groups

# Create Modifier Group

Creates a new product modifier group.

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| designation | string | Yes | Group name (2-255 characters) |
| minSelections | number | No | Minimum selections allowed (default: 0) |
| maxSelections | number | No | Maximum selections allowed (nullable) |
| selectionType | string | No | Selection type: "single" or "multi" (default: "multi") |
| required | boolean | No | Whether selection is required (default: false) |
| available | boolean | No | Whether group is available (default: true) |
| sortOrder | number | No | Sort order (default: 0) |

## Response

- **201 Created**: Modifier group created successfully
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Get Modifier Group

Retrieves a single modifier group by ID.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |

## Response

- **200 OK**: Returns modifier group data
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier group not found

# Update Modifier Group

Updates an existing modifier group.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| designation | string | Yes | Group name (2-255 characters) |
| minSelections | number | No | Minimum selections allowed |
| maxSelections | number | No | Maximum selections allowed (nullable) |
| selectionType | string | No | Selection type: "single" or "multi" |
| required | boolean | No | Whether selection is required |
| available | boolean | No | Whether group is available |
| sortOrder | number | No | Sort order |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier group updated successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier group not found
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Delete Modifier Group

Deletes a modifier group and all its associated modifiers.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier group deleted successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier group not found

# List Modifiers

Retrieves a paginated list of all modifiers within a modifier group.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | 10 | Items per page |
| q | string | - | Search term to filter by designation |
| sortBy | string | sortOrder | Sort field |
| sortOrder | string | asc | Sort order (asc/desc) |

## Response

- **200 OK**: Returns paginated list of modifiers
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier group not found

# Create Modifier

Creates a new modifier within a modifier group.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| designation | string | Yes | Modifier name (2-255 characters) |
| priceAdjustment | number | No | Price adjustment amount (default: 0) |
| adjustmentType | string | No | Adjustment type: "fixed" or "percentage" (default: "fixed") |
| available | boolean | No | Whether modifier is available (default: true) |
| sortOrder | number | No | Sort order (default: 0) |

## Response

- **201 Created**: Modifier created successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier group not found
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Get Modifier

Retrieves a single modifier by ID.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |
| modifierId | uuid | Modifier ID |

## Response

- **200 OK**: Returns modifier data
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier not found

# Update Modifier

Updates an existing modifier.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |
| modifierId | uuid | Modifier ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| designation | string | Yes | Modifier name (2-255 characters) |
| priceAdjustment | number | No | Price adjustment amount |
| adjustmentType | string | No | Adjustment type: "fixed" or "percentage" |
| available | boolean | No | Whether modifier is available |
| sortOrder | number | No | Sort order |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier updated successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier not found
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Delete Modifier

Deletes a modifier from a modifier group.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | Modifier group ID |
| modifierId | uuid | Modifier ID |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier deleted successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Modifier not found

# List Product Modifier Groups

Retrieves all modifier groups attached to a specific product.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| productId | uuid | Product ID |

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | 10 | Items per page |
| q | string | - | Search term to filter by designation |
| sortBy | string | sortOrder | Sort field |
| sortOrder | string | asc | Sort order (asc/desc) |

## Response

- **200 OK**: Returns paginated list of modifier groups
- **404 Not Found**: Product not found

# Attach Modifier Group to Product

Attaches a modifier group to a product, allowing customers to select modifiers when ordering.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| productId | uuid | Product ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| modifierGroupId | uuid | Yes | Modifier group ID to attach |
| sortOrder | number | No | Sort order for display (default: 0) |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier group attached successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Product or modifier group not found
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

# Detach Modifier Group from Product

Detaches a modifier group from a product.

## Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| productId | uuid | Product ID |

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| modifierGroupId | uuid | Yes | Modifier group ID to detach |

## Response

- **204 No Content**: Modifier group detached successfully
- **404 Not Found**: Product or modifier group not found
- **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error
